message: tests/support/test_str.py: No test was added to verify that format_money rejects bool inputs (e.g., format_money(True) raising TypeError). The implementation fix is correct but untested.
tests/support/test_str.py: Task requires edge-case tests for both normalize_email AND pluralize, but only normalize_email tests were added. Pluralize edge-case tests are missing.
task_hint: Add edge-case tests for normalize_email and pluralize
